title: 3 Pairs of Festive Socks for Baby - Soft Cotton Rich Christmas Wear for Babies - Size 0-2.5 Approx Age 0-12 Months (Stripes)
description: Introducing Green Cheeks Festive Baby Socks Set, a delightful collection of three pairs of soft, cotton-rich socks designed to add a touch of holiday charm to your little one's wardrobe. Crafted with care and attention to detail, these socks are the perfect blend of comfort and style for babies aged 0-12 months. Key Features: Premium Composition: Our festive baby socks are made with a high-quality blend of 76% Cotton, 20% Polyester, and 2% Elastane, ensuring a soft and cozy feel for your baby's delicate skin. Versatile Size: Sized at 0-2.5, these socks are suitable for babies approximately 0-12 months old. The perfect accessory to keep tiny toes warm and stylish during the holiday season. Adorable Design Choices: Choose between classic stripes or charming patterns to suit your baby's style. Each set includes three pairs, offering variety and versatility for any festive occasion. Ideal Novelty Gift: Green Cheeks Festive Baby Socks make for an adorable and thoughtful gift for new parents or as a charming addition to your little one's holiday wardrobe. These socks are a must-have novelty item for celebrating the festive season with your baby. Easy Care Instructions: To keep these festive socks looking as good as new, simply wash them with similar colors at 30 degrees. Our socks are designed for durability, ensuring they withstand the wear and tear of active little feet. Elevate your baby's festive fashion with Green Cheeks Festive Baby Socks Set - the perfect combination of comfort, style, and holiday cheer. Order now to add a touch of magic to your baby's first holiday season!
